name: iPhone 15 Pro
description: Experience the next generation of iPhone with the titanium design, A17 Pro chip, and a pro camera system that shoots 4K ProRes video.

name: Samsung Galaxy S24 Ultra
description: The Galaxy S24 Ultra features a built-in S Pen, 200MP camera, and the most powerful Galaxy AI experience ever.

name: MacBook Air M3
description: MacBook Air with M3 chip brings you a strikingly thin design, exceptional performance, and up to 18 hours of battery life.

name: Dell XPS 15
description: The XPS 15 packs professional-grade performance with a gorgeous OLED display, perfect for creators and power users.

name: Sony WH-1000XM5
description: Industry-leading noise canceling headphones with crystal-clear call quality and up to 30 hours of battery life.

name: Apple Watch Ultra 2
description: The most rugged and capable Apple Watch with the most accurate GPS, a 60-hour battery life, and the brightest display.
